REM: AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-15-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-19-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED AS TO MARK COTTONHAM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARK $888.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $976.00, PLAINTIFF TO RETURN THE 1978 LINCOLN TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 14 DAYS OF THE DAY JUDGMENT IS MAILED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTTONHAM, MARK $888.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $976.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S REQUEST TO FILE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED PER LEGAL ADVICE. NO FEE, PLFT IFP ON FILE.
COPY OF AMENDED ORDER MAILED TO PLFT AND DEFT TOGETHER WITH THE AMENDED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.
